items.title: 1000 Men and Me: The Bonnie Blue Story
items.overview: Adult content creator Bonnie Blue announced that she’d slept with 1057 men in 12 hours. Exploring the polarising debate around Bonnie and the pornification of our society, the film follows her over the most eye-opening six months of her life.

items.title: American Swing
items.overview: Chronicles the rise and fall of 1970s New York City nightclub Plato's Retreat.

items.title: Maternal Instinct
items.overview: Police pull over a woman who claims she just gave birth. But the baby — and the blood — aren't hers. Twisted lies unravel in this true-crime documentary.

items.title: The Crash
items.overview: A teen slams her car into a building, killing her boyfriend and his friend. What seems like a tragic accident becomes a murder case.

items.title: Jackass: Best and Last
items.overview: The fifth and final installment to Jackass franchise where the crew go on one last insane crusade.

items.title: Mia
items.overview: Mia recounts her most intimate confessions, uncensored, in her first approach to a totally new world of domination and submission.

items.title: Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition
items.overview: With unprecedented access to the official archives and intimate recollections from the band, both current and past,  Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition invites fans to experience one of the most iconic journeys in music history.  Spanning five decades, this electrifying documentary charts the band’s rise

items.title: Chinese Erotic Movies
items.overview: A full length documentary on sexy Chinese movies (including sizzling scenes from EROTIC GHOST STORY, SEX AND ZEN, CONFESSIONS OF A CONCUBINE, SEX AND THE EMPEROR and many more.

items.title: Bowling for Columbine
items.overview: This is not a film about gun control. items.title: Q-Pop
items.overview: Q-POP follows 23-year-old Quechua artist and viral sensation Lenin Tamayo, creator of “Q-Pop,” a genre that fuses K-Pop with Quechua, an Indigenous tongue that has endured for centuries but faces an uncertain future among younger generations. items.title: Kairos
items.overview: Documentary showing class of 2026 ‘Kairos’ last 10 days of the senior year.

items.title: Selena Gomez: My Mind & Me
items.overview: After years in the limelight, Selena Gomez achieves unimaginable stardom. But just as she reaches a new peak, an unexpected turn pulls her into darkness. This uniquely raw and intimate documentary spans her six-year journey into a new light.

items.title: Jazz Suave
items.overview: Amid the frenetic pace of New York City, a group of young musicians confronts the paradox of pursuing a professional career in the world of jazz while struggling for economic survival. Their experience highlights how, at times, artistic life and financial stability appear to follow irreconcilable pa

items.title: Frontier Documentary
items.overview: An NHS nurse of twenty years reflects on a challenging and strenuous career as time dwindles to her retirement.

items.title: Horse Shoeing
items.overview: One of the pictures to be seen in the machine, for example, was that of a blacksmith shop in which two men were working, one shoeing a horse, the other heating iron at the forge. One would be seen to drive the nail into the shoe of the horse's hoof, to change his position and every movement needed i

items.title: Jackass: The Movie
items.overview: Johnny Knoxville and his band of maniacs perform a variety of stunts and gross-out gags on the big screen for the first time. They wander around Japan in panda outfits, wreak havoc on a once civilized golf course, they even do stunts involving LIVE alligators, and so on.

items.title: A Girl's Guide to 21st Century Sex
items.overview: A Girl's Guide to 21st Century Sex is a documentary TV series about sex, which ran in eight episodes on Channel 5 and was presented by Dr Catherine Hood. The 45-minute long episodes were broadcast on Monday nights. The series started on 30 October 2006, with the final programme broadcast on 18 Decem

items.title: Horizon
items.overview: Horizon tells amazing science stories, unravels mysteries and reveals worlds you've never seen before.

items.title: Mayday
items.overview: Major real-life air disasters are depicted in this series. Each episode features a detailed dramatized reconstruction of the incident based on cockpit voice recorders and air traffic control transcripts, as well as eyewitnesses recounts and interviews with aviation experts.

items.title: The Sky at Night
items.overview: Your monthly journey through the fascinating world of space and astronomy with the latest thinking on what's out there in space and what you can see in the night sky.

items.title: Echappées Belles
items.overview: Échappées Belles is a French weekly discovery magazine, broadcast on Saturdays in the first part of the evening on France 5 since September 30, 2006. It is presented in turn by Sophie Jovillard, Jérôme Pitorin, Ismaël Khelifa, Tiga, Sabine Quindou, Théo Curin and Anto Cocagne.

items.title: NOVA
items.overview: PBS' premier science series helps viewers of all ages explore the science behind the headlines. Along the way, NOVA demystifies science and technology, and highlights the people involved in scientific pursuits.

items.title: MythBusters
items.overview: MythBusters is a science entertainment television program created and produced by Australia's Beyond Television Productions for the Discovery Channel. items.title: Sidemen
items.overview: Welcome to the official Sidemen channel. The home of #SidemenSundays - We post new Sidemen videos every single Sunday!

items.title: Couples Therapy
items.overview: Far from reality-show caricatures, this is true documentary filmmaking that brings viewers into the authentic and visceral experience of weekly therapy with four couples. World-class therapist Dr. Orna Guralnik deftly guides the couples through the minefield of honest confrontation with each other a

items.title: Frontline
items.overview: Since it began in 1983, Frontline has been airing public-affairs documentaries that explore a wide scope of the complex human experience. Frontline's goal is to extend the impact of the documentary beyond its initial broadcast by serving as a catalyst for change.

items.title: American Experience
items.overview: TV's most-watched history series brings to life the compelling stories from our past that inform our understanding of the world today.

items.title: Nature
items.overview: Consistently stunning documentaries transport viewers to far-flung locations ranging from the torrid African plains to the chilly splendours of icy Antarctica. The show's primary focus is on animals and ecosystems around the world. A comic book based on the show, meant to be used an as educational t

items.title: Natural World
items.overview:
Natural World is a nature documentary television series broadcast annually on BBC Two and regarded by the BBC as its flagship natural history brand. It is currently the longest-running series in its genre on British television, with more than 400 episodes broadcast since its inception in 1983.

items.title: Ancient Aliens
items.overview: Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago? From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts

items.title: TeleEncyclopedia
items.overview:
Since 1965, when it was launched by Octavian Paler on Romanian Television, TeleEncyclopedia has "illuminated" the communist era for many Romanians. It was a magical show, airing every Saturday at 7:00 PM. Today, it still evokes nostalgia in those who grew up watching it.

items.title: Bares für Rares
items.overview: In the show, selected applicants each present a curiosity, rarity or antique they have brought with them. items.title: Panorama
items.overview: Current affairs programme, featuring interviews and investigative reports on a wide variety of subjects.

items.title: American Masters
items.overview: American Masters is a PBS television series which produces biographies on enduring writers, musicians, visual and performing artists, dramatists, filmmakers, and others who have left an indelible impression on the cultural landscape of the United States.

items.title: Great Performances
items.overview: The best in the performing arts from across America and around the world including a diverse programming portfolio of classical music, opera, popular song, musical theater, dance, drama, and performance documentaries.
